title: I don't feel safe!
description: A mod which makes your routine everyday jobs harder
body:
This mod's goal is to make you feel danger everywhere! Because Minecraft is too easy, don't you think?

All features are turned on by default, but you can disable and fine-tweak everything using configs.

 

**Features:**



**1. Dropped items are BAD for ecology (and your server)!**

That's why now every dropped item instead of despawning will turn into hostile mob (Silverfish by default).

This feature also decreases the time which needed for item to despawn.


 

**2. Mining isn't that safe!**

Some of ores will fight back! And will require a pickaxe of appropriate level to be "harvested" when killed.


 

**3. Animals require a gentle approach**

Forget about milking cows and shearing sheep! At least not before you feed them... They will fight back sometimes.


 

**4. Lava is too hot!**

... For the regular bucket. That's why it is advised not to use Iron Bucket for handling it. Use the Obsidian one!


 

**5. An Evil Poison Hemlock**

If you leave your farmland empty for too long, an evil plant may appear. All behold! Poison Hemlock! This plant will grow for two blocks tall just to take over your other adjacent plants and replace them with itself. Since version 1.2.0 Flowers of Poison Hemlock can be used for brewing Transformation Potion. By default, the Transformation Potion only used to transform Zombified Piglin into Zombie plus Pig. But you can extend that list using configs.


 

If you have additional ideas about your everyday chores in Minecraft and want it to be harder, you're welcome to comments!
